title: 2023 Goals
html:
Yahir's New Year planning doc setting overarching life goals (buy mom a house by the river, find a partner, follow passions) and concrete 2023 targets across reading, fitness, presidency of OSIG, crypto, and side income.

TL;DR

  • Stretch goals include 250k bank account, full marathon, 25 books/yr, 730+ coding hours — early sketch of ambitious life thesis.
  • Names OSIG presidency and the coinbase pitch as priority outcomes for the term.
  • Plans monthly book reports with valeria for accountability — sister-as-coach pattern.
  • Lists ChatGPT and crypto as the bets to "make 10k a month" — first hint of crypto meta arc that runs through 2023.
  • Voice: aspirational, list-heavy, not yet philosophical — pre-fasting, pre-PHIB, pre-China-arc.

yahir family · valeria · osig · coinbase pitch · crypto meta · ambitious life
